question:
Will FC Red Bull Salzburg win on 2025-10-23?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for October 23, 2025
If FC Red Bull Salzburg wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.uefa.com/

evidences.title: FC Salzburg (FC Red Bull Salzburg) - history
evidences.content: This period also saw Salzburg build its reputation internationally, as they reached the final of the UEFA Cup in 1994. Still, they were no match for Internazionale, who won both games with a scoreline of 1-0. Next season, Salzburg qualified for the group stage of the Champions League by defeating Maccabi Haifa 5-2. They eventually finished third in a strong group containing defending champions Milan, eventual winners Ajax, and AEK Athens. ### The new arena [...] ### FC Red Bull Salzburg timeline 1933 The club is established as SV Austria Salzburg. 1978 The club is renamed as SV Casino Salzburg. 1994 First time national league champions. 1994 First time winner of Austrian Supercup. 1997 The club is renamed as SV Wüstenrot Salzburg due to sponsorship reasons. 2003 The club moves to the Wals-Siezenheim stadium (later known as the Red Bull Arena). 2005 The club is rebranded to FC Red Bull Salzburg after a takeover by the Red Bull company. 2007 Winning the top division after collecting 75 points, a new club record. 2012 First Austrian Cup title. 2018 Winning the top division without losing a single match at home ground. ### External links › Official website › Red Bull Salzburg on Wik...

evidences.title: Real Madrid to be without recognised right-back against Red Bull Salzburg in Champions League - The Athletic
evidences.content: Dani Carvajal is currently sidelined by an anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury sustained in October, while Lucas Vazquez is suspended after picking up his third yellow card of the competition’s league phase in Madrid’s 3-2 win over Atalanta in December. Advertisement Lorenzo Aguado — who has mostly played for the club’s reserve side Real Madrid Castilla in the Spanish third tier — has featured twice for the senior team this season but is unavailable for Champions League fixtures as he was not included on Madrid’s A list for UEFA competition and he is ineligible for the B list due to his age. [...] 21-year-old centre-back Raul Asencio only made his Madrid debut in late November but could get the nod at right-back, while midfielder Federico Valverde is another candidate to fill the position. Head coach Carlo Ancelotti does have multiple versatile players in his squad but has been dealt a blow by injuries. Eduardo Camavinga and Aurelien Tchouameni have filled in as a left-back and a centre-back respectively, but Camavinga is out with a hamstring injury and Tchouameni is a doubt for Wednesday after missing Madrid’s win over Las Palmas on Sunday with physical discomfort.
